commands.review_summary:
The PR makes Discord message search accept query/content, infer a missing guildId from the current or supplied channel, normalize channel IDs before search, and adds regression tests.

PR surface: Source +47, Tests +121. Total +168 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main requires guildId in both the search action entry point and runtime handler while the tool context carries currentChannelId but not currentGuildId. I did not rerun a live Discord bot session in this read-only review.
